turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" role="img" aria-label="inspire">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/>
  <!-- rays -->
  <g fill="none" stroke="#FFD54F" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.95">
    <path d="M256 60 L256 120"/>
    <path d="M256 392 L256 452"/>
    <path d="M60 256 L120 256"/>
    <path d="M392 256 L452 256"/>
    <path d="M108 108 L150 150"/>
    <path d="M362 362 L404 404"/>
    <path d="M404 108 L362 150"/>
    <path d="M150 362 L108 404"/>
  </g>

  <!-- light bulb body -->
  <g transform="translate(0,0)">
    <path d="M256 120
             C206 120 170 160 170 206
             C170 238 186 262 204 279
             C214 289 222 300 224 314
             L288 314
             C290 300 298 289 308 279
             C326 262 342 238 342 206
             C342 160 306 120 256 120 Z" 
          fill="#FFEB3B" stroke="#F4B400" stroke-width="6"/>

    <!-- bulb inner glow -->
    <path d="M256 140
             C216 140 188 170 188 206
             C188 232 202 252 217 266
             C229 277 238 292 238 308
             L274 308
             C274 292 283 277 295 266
             C310 252 324 232 324 206
             C324 170 296 140 256 140 Z" 
          fill="#FFF59D" opacity="0.65"/>

    <!-- base -->
    <g>
      <rect x="208" y="318" width="96" height="32" rx="12" fill="#FFB300" stroke="#E08A00" stroke-width="6"/>
      <rect x="196" y="350" width="120" height="36" rx="18" fill="#FFA726" stroke="#E08A00" stroke-width="6"/>
      <path d="M214 386 C240 406 272 406 298 386" fill="none" stroke="#E08A00" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>

    <!-- subtle highlight -->
    <path d="M233 150 C212 164 204 186 205 206" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55"/>

    <!-- filament lines -->
    <g stroke="#D84315" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9">
      <path d="M220 322 L256 322"/>
      <path d="M256 322 L292 322"/>
      <path d="M236 332 C248 344 264 344 276 332"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- small floating sparkles -->
  <g fill="#FFFFFF" opacity="0.9">
    <path d="M128 210 l10 5 l-10 5 l-10 -5 Z"/>
    <path d="M390 190 l8 4 l-8 4 l-8 -4 Z"/>
    <path d="M150 320 l9 5 l-9 5 l-9 -5 Z"/>
  </g>
  <g fill="none" stroke="#FFEA00" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9">
    <path d="M136 230 l-12 0"/>
    <path d="M376 170 l-12 0"/>
    <path d="M158 340 l-12 0"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Creating an inspire icon**

I need to design an icon that represents the word "inspire" without using any text. A lightbulb with rays could convey that idea well. I'm thinking of using simple shapes to form the lightbulb, making sure there are no letters or numbers involved. The final design should be in SVG format, with a size of 512x512 pixels. This way, it should be clear and visually appealing!

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
